[[BLOCK:p_101]]
Security and Safety – Downtown/Hawaii Loa Campus

[[BLOCK:p_103]]
We ask all students to help maintain a safe campus environment. In an emergency, call 911. For non-emergencies, contact the HPU Security Office at (808) 544-1400. Prompt reporting of suspicious activity to security or law enforcement plays an important role in preventing crime.  

HPU Security also offers a walking escort service called SafeWalk for anyone traveling alone to a university parking lot, facility, or city bus stop. Call (808) 236-3515 (Hawaii Loa) or (808) 544-1400 (all other HPU locations), and a security officer will be sent to your location.  

To receive important alerts by text message, please update your mobile number and enroll in HPU’s emergency text notification system, Rave Alert (http://phone.hpu.edu). For more information about campus safety and emergency preparedness, visit: https://www.hpu.edu/security/index.html

[[BLOCK:p_105]]
Title IX: Policy on Sex Discrimination and Sexual Harassment

[[BLOCK:p_107]]
HPU is committed to maintaining a safe learning, living, and working environment free from sex discrimination and sexual harassment. Students, faculty, and staff are encouraged to report incidents of sexual harassment, sexual assault, stalking, domestic violence, dating violence, and other forms of sex discrimination so that timely support and appropriate resolutions can be provided through either informal or formal complaint procedures.  

Support services may include help with filing a police report; referrals to counseling and medical providers; assignment of an advisor for the complainant or respondent; adjustments to work or class schedules; changes to work locations or on-campus housing; and assistance with academic accommodations.  

Anyone aware of such incidents should contact the Title IX Coordinator at (808) 544-0276, use the red “Report Sexual Violence or Interpersonal Violence” button at www.hpu.edu/titleix to submit an online report, or file an anonymous report online. For additional details, please visit www.hpu.edu/studenthandbook. www.hpu.edu/studenthandbook.
